name: catcode-chatgpt-provider
description: ChatGPT Plus/Pro (Codex) subscription OAuth as a plugin. Uses OpenAI's public Codex OAuth client + device-code flow; catcode owns tools and the agent loop.

oauth.label: ChatGPT (Codex)
oauth.description: ChatGPT subscription via Codex backend (device-code OAuth). Install this plugin, then /login chatgpt.
